checklistOpen.text: 开电视 → 点餐机 → 开音乐 → 擦拭前台 → 扫地与拖地
checklistOpen.textEn: Turn on TV → POS terminal → turn on music → wipe front counter → sweep and mop floor

checklistOpen.text: 检查商品上/下架是否正确
checklistOpen.textEn: Check that menu items are correctly listed / unlisted

checklistOpen.text: ⚠️ 珍珠奶茶、海盐芝士、珍珠、奶茶在珍珠未煮好前需下架
checklistOpen.textEn: ⚠️ Bubble Tea, Pink Salt, Pearl/Bubble, and milk tea must be taken off the menu until pearls are cooked

checklistOpen.text: 咖啡机开机、补水、清洁蒸汽头
checklistOpen.textEn: Turn on espresso machine, refill water, clean steam wand
Clean ice bin and refill with ice

checklistOpen.text: ⚠️ 绿茶 & 桂花乌龙必须从冰箱中取出新鲜茶液，不可使用隔夜茶
checklistOpen.textEn: ⚠️ Green tea & osmanthus oolong must be fresh from fridge — do not use overnight tea

checklistOpen.text: 左侧工作台：脆啵啵、厚椰乳、草莓/芒果/桃子酱、水与干净抹布
checklistOpen.textEn: Left workstation: Crispy Boba, thick coconut milk, strawberry/mango/peach jam, water and clean cloth

checklistOpen.text: 工具准备：榨汁棒、搅拌棒、100ml & 250ml & 0.5oz 量杯
checklistOpen.textEn: Prepare tools: muddler, stirrer, 100ml & 250ml & 0.5oz measuring cups

checklistOpen.text: 右侧工作台：橙子酱、西柚酱、kiwi 酱、葡萄酱、百香果酱、芒果酱
checklistOpen.textEn: Right workstation: orange jam, grapefruit jam, kiwi jam, grape jam, passion fruit jam, mango jam

checklistOpen.text: 工作台与冰箱外部必须无水果残渍
checklistOpen.textEn: Work counter and fridge exterior must be free of fruit residue

checklistOpen.text: 前台补货：备足杯子、杯盖、吸管、热饮套、餐巾纸
checklistOpen.textEn: Restock front counter: cups, lids, straws, hot sleeves, napkins

checklistOpen.text: 客席区：桌面干净、纸巾充足
checklistOpen.textEn: Customer seating area: clean tables, sufficient napkins

checklistClose.text: 全店地面清洁（扫地 + 拖地）

checklistClose.textEn: Clean ice bin and empty it

checklistClose.text: 咖啡机收水与清洁（蒸汽头排空 + 擦净）
checklistClose.textEn: Drain and clean espresso machine (purge steam wand + wipe clean)

checklistClose.text: 清洗全部工具（榨汁棒、搅拌棒、量杯等）
checklistClose.textEn: Wash all tools (muddler, stirrer, measuring cups, etc.)
Turn off all appliances and lights

checklistStock.text: 码柜区：切片水果遵守先进先出（FIFO）
checklistStock.textEn: Storage area: sliced fruit must follow FIFO (first in, first out)

checklistStock.text: 橙子片满盆，青柠半盆以上，柠檬约 1/3 盆，西柚片半个～一个
checklistStock.textEn: Orange slices: full container; lime: more than half container; lemon: approx. 1/3 container; grapefruit slices: half to one grapefruit

checklistStock.text: 柑橘类果汁：橙汁 ≥ 1L，西柚汁 ≈ 600ml
checklistStock.textEn: Citrus juices: orange juice ≥ 1L, grapefruit juice ≈ 600ml

checklistStock.text: 西柚粒须戴手套剥好并用摇杯散开
checklistStock.textEn: Grapefruit segments must be peeled with gloves and separated using a shaker cup

checklistStock.text: ⚠️ 西瓜片、西米、果冻提前确认库存（备货时间需 1–2 小时）
checklistStock.textEn: ⚠️ Watermelon slices, Sago, and jelly — confirm stock in advance (prep time 1–2 hours)

checklistStock.text: 脆啵啵用量大，需随时补充
checklistStock.textEn: Crispy Boba usage is high — replenish at all times

checklistStock.text: 水果杯区（Kiwi、西瓜捣碎、葡萄等）严格先进先出，交接时明确哪一侧旧货先用
checklistStock.textEn: Fruit cup area (Kiwi, crushed watermelon, grapes, etc.) — strict FIFO; clarify which side to use first during shift handover

checklistStock.text: 咖啡区：确保咖啡机水与咖啡豆足够，咖啡头定时清洁
checklistStock.textEn: Coffee station: ensure machine water and coffee beans are sufficient; clean group head regularly

checklistStock.text: 蒸汽喷头每次使用后立即擦净并排空蒸汽
checklistStock.textEn: Wipe and purge steam wand immediately after each use

checklistStock.text: 咖啡机下冷藏区：两种牛奶、half & half、creamer 分区放置
checklistStock.textEn: Under-machine fridge: two types of milk, half & half, creamer — stored in separate sections

checklistStock.text: ⚠️ 紫薯和芋头提前沟通备料（需要 3 小时）
checklistStock.textEn: ⚠️ Purple yam and taro — coordinate prep in advance (requires 3 hours)
Confirm Cheese Foam dispenser is clean after use

checklistStock.text: 咖啡奶比例：30g 咖啡奶 + 70g organic milk
checklistStock.textEn: Coffee milk ratio: 30g Evaporated Milk + 70g organic milk
